name: cooldown-action
title: Cooldown Action
author: Tanmay Sharma & Simran Gupta
description: Runs a caller-provided action, then makes it available again after an accurate bounded cooldown.

changes: Converted the PropTypes class source to TypeScript while preserving its existing duration, label, style, class, options, and resend props under the generic Cooldown Action name.
Derived the displayed remainder from an end timestamp, paused scheduled updates while the document is hidden, reconciled duration changes, and cleared the timeout and visibility listener on unmount.
Awaited the real resend callback, prevented duplicate activation, restarted cooldown only after fulfillment, and left failed actions available with a polite one-time status.
Removed hard-coded font, color, border, and typography defaults; added a non-submitting native button, static pending feedback, explicit non-live countdown, and a minimum touch target.

notices: The pinned upstream LICENSE has trailing spaces on 12 lines; the local evidence copy removes only that trailing whitespace without changing the legal text.

modifications.change: Mechanically typed and generically named the class, replaced decrementing intervals with an end-time scheduler, added visibility and duration reconciliation, awaited and guarded the real action lifecycle, exposed concise status, and removed visual defaults while retaining existing source props.
modifications.reason: Keep cooldown time correct through tab throttling, make caller success or failure authoritative, preserve native keyboard and form behavior, avoid repeated announcements, honor static reduced-motion behavior, and keep the source-copy API intact.
